ogTitle: Round Swamp vs Rous Mill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Round Swamp and Rous Mill.
heading: Round Swamp vs Rous Mill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Round Swamp, New South Wales and Rous Mill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rous Mill has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Round Swamp (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Round Swamp or Rous Mill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Round Swamp has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Rous Mill scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Round Swamp scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Rous Mill scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Round Swamp or Rous Mill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rous Mill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
